stemHtml:
Based on the following transmissions, identify the service provided by ATS unit B:

ATS unit A: "G-CD, cleared to cross A1 at Wicken"
ATS unit B: "G-CD, suggest right heading 120 degrees"

options.a: Air Traffic Advisory Service, offering a lower level of safety than unit A.
options.b: Alerting Service, offering a lower level of safety than unit A.
options.c: Air Traffic Control Service, offering the same level of safety as unit A.
options.d: Air Traffic Control Service, offering a higher level of safety than unit A.
